rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure that assumptions and guarantees are placed in valid scopes according to the AADL model structure
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Align helper declaration types with the expression types to prevent type mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
